temporal_description:
(00:00-00:02) A low-angle, close-up shot follows the legs and feet of two men in dark suits as they walk across a wet, reflective surface at night. The man on the left holds a flashlight, its beam cutting through the darkness. The scene is dark and moody, with out-of-focus streetlights in the background. (Storyline: This opening shot establishes a mysterious and tense atmosphere, introducing two characters who appear to be on a mission or heading towards a clandestine meeting.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The distinct sound of footsteps on a wet, hard surface, accompanied by a low, ominous musical score.)
(00:03-00:05) The scene cuts to a wide shot of a dark, wet city street at night. Two men in suits walk towards a vintage, dark-colored Rolls-Royce. The car's headlights are off, and its license plate reads 'AY 3333'. The city lights and a large building are visible in the background. (Storyline: This shot establishes the setting and introduces a key element: the vintage luxury car. The men's purposeful walk towards it suggests they are about to meet someone or something important.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The ominous, low-frequency score continues, building suspense.)
